CONTENT.Career: Born in Angers, Manceau has played for Angers SCO since he was 6 in 1995. He started his professional career as a defensive midfielder, later being moved the full-back position. In June 2016, he agreed a contract extension until 2020 with the club.On 21 July 2022, Manceau signed a contract with Guingamp for two years with an option for a third year.
CONTENT.External links: Vincent Manceau – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)Vincent Manceau at L'Équipe Football (in French)Vincent Manceau at SoccerwayVincent Manceau profile at Foot-National.com

SUMMARY: Vincent Manceau (born 10 July 1989) is a French professional footballer who most recently played as a right-back for Guingamp.
